CONTINUANCE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO JOEL MEDINA.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOEL MEDINA NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOLLAR RENT A CAR PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2008 - CONTINUED TO MAY-29-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER RETURNED TO THE CALENDAR FOR FURTHER HEARING ON THE ISSUE OF THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE RENTED DODGE AUTOMOBILE. DEFENDANT SHALL APPEAR WITH REGISTRATION AND OTHER DOCUMENTS PERTAINING TO OWNERSHIP OF THE VEHICLE ON THE DATE OF THE ACCIDENT. CLERK SHALL SET TIME OF HEARING AND NOTIFY PARTIES. EXHIBITS TO BE HELD PENDING FURTHER HEARING. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DOLLAR RENT A CAR SYSTEMS INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2008 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUN-09-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOLLAR RENT A CAR PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOEL MEDINA NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. DEPARTMENT 506 SITTING IN DEPARTMENT 525.
CONTINUANCE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO JOEL MEDINA.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-09-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DOLLAR RENT A CAR SYSTEMS INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-09-2008 AT 1:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALASPINA, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDINA, JOEL $4,700.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,700.00, DEFENDANT DOLLAR RENT A CAR DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT JOEL MEDINA NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RETURN OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - SENT TO JOEL MEDINA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF MALASPINA, JOHN
